subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath established Himself upon the throne with grandeur, might and majesty, and hath uttered that which was breathed forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی استقر علی العرش بالعظمه و العزه و الکبریاء و نطق بما نفخ فی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
